title: SmartServe POS System
subtitle: Multi-Tier Point of Sale Application
overview: Designed and implemented a multi-tier POS system applying MVC architecture and role-based access control (admin/cashier/kitchen).

story.content: Built RESTful service layer with Express.js using modular routing and middleware; optimized MongoDB queries with indexing to handle 50+ concurrent transactions — cutting billing time by ~40% with zero data integrity errors.
